tool.name: Mac Send Notification
tool.description: Send a system notification on the Mac.

ai.systemPromptSection:
### mac_notification
Send a macOS system notification.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "mac_notification", "query": "{\"title\": \"Title\", \"message\": \"Body text\"}"}
```

**Parameters:**
- title: Notification title (required)
- message: Body text (required)
- subtitle: Optional subtitle

**Returns:** success, notificationId
whenToUse: Need to alert user of something
